commands.review_summary:
The PR scopes Matrix room-history queues, watermarks, message reads, sends, edits, tests, docs, and changelog by native Matrix thread.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a current-main live run: current main resolves Matrix thread identity but keeps room-history calls room-flat and emits fallback relation metadata. The PR also includes focused tests plus redacted live Matrix output proving the after-fix thread-read and reply-placement paths.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; maintainers should trigger a fresh ClawSweeper review or proof-gate rerun, then finish normal review/merge handling if the exact head remains green.

commands.command: re-review please. i pushed the endpoint repair in `a830104dbcb0d1a59439f788358561c4d67f1667`: - `readmatrixmessages({ threadid })` now calls the spec/repo-consistent v1 relations path: `get /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomid}/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread/m.room.message` - the focused matrix test now asserts the v1 path, including encoded room and thread ids. local validation after the fix: ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/actions.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts test files 4 passed (4) tests 72 passed (72) ``` ```text node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsbuildinfofile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/matrix-thread-pr-20260508-v1endpoint-rerun.tsbuildinfo # passed ``` ```text git diff --check node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/formatting.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts docs/channels/matrix.md changelog.md all matched files use the correct format. ``` real behavior proof from a live matrix setup, redacted: ```text captured_at_utc: 2026-05-08t15:09:36z pr_head: a830104dbcb0d1a59439f788358561c4d67f1667 source: karabo openclaw runtime matrix credentials from the running docker container; tokens and raw room/event ids omitted live matrix actions: - created a temporary private matrix room - sent one main-room message - sent two thread roots - sent one thread reply under each root v1 relations endpoint queried: get /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomid}/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread/m.room.message?dir=f&limit=20 results: - thread a relation event hashes: ['7334fb097f47'] - thread b relation event hashes: ['0a3554f749b5'] - thread a isolated from thread b: true - thread b isolated from thread a: true fetched live reply event relation shape: - thread a relation keys: ['event_id', 'rel_type'] - thread a has is_falling_back: false - thread a has m.in_reply_to: false - thread a relation shape valid: true - thread b relation keys: ['event_id', 'rel_type'] - thread b has is_falling_back: false - thread b has m.in_reply_to: false - thread b relation shape valid: true result: - live v1 thread reads isolated: true - live thread reply placement avoids fallback metadata: true - cleanup: left temporary proof room overall_real_behavior_proof_passed: true ``` this covers the requested live synapse/matrix proof for the v1 relations endpoint, isolated native thread reads, and reply placement without fallback metadata.

Local validation after the fix: ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/actions.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts Test Files 4 passed (4) Tests 72 passed (72) ``` ```text node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/matrix-thread-pr-20260508-v1endpoint-rerun.tsbuildinfo # passed ``` ```text git diff --check node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/formatting.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts docs/channels/matrix.md CHANGELOG.md All matched files use the correct format. ``` Real behavior proof from a live Matrix setup, redacted: ```text captured_at_utc: 2026-05-08T15:09:36Z pr_head: a830104dbcb0d1a59439f788358561c4d67f1667 source: Karabo OpenClaw runtime Matrix credentials from the running Docker container;
